channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: U6: Impurity
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: contamination. [On 25.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: contamination.
[On 25.05.2026]

item.title: Wien Westbahnhof: Mariahilfer Street from Europaplatz and Mariahilfer Belt to Palmgasse and Gerstnerstraße
item.description: The actual area of Mariahilfer Straße is to be closed for vehicle traffic. [25.05.2026 – 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The actual area of Mariahilfer Straße is to be closed for vehicle traffic.
[25.05.2026 – 30.06.2026]

item.title: Brünner Straße 59
item.description: The installation of a district heating line is carried out during the night from 20:00 to 05:00 with the release of a correspondingly wide residual runway of at least … [17.05.2026 – 14.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The installation of a district heating line is carried out during the night from 20:00 to 05:00 with the release of a correspondingly wide residual runway of at least …
[17.05.2026 – 14.08.2026]

item.title: Brünner Straße from Schloßhofer Straße and Am Spitz to Karl-Schäfer-Straße
item.description: The stop Peitlgasse (direction Floridsdorf) of the public transport concerned is to Brünner Straße ON. construction phase 1 of 4 … [Since 11.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The stop Peitlgasse (direction Floridsdorf) of the public transport concerned is to Brünner Straße ON. construction phase 1 of 4 …
[Since 11.05.2026]

item.title: Aumannplatz 1 to Gentzgasse and Türkenschanzstraße
item.description: in the shadow of track construction works of Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG, the pipe laying work takes place during the day in the area of the roadway and the bicycle strip and when the … is blocked [04.05.2026 – 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
in the shadow of track construction works of Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG, the pipe laying work takes place during the day in the area of the roadway and the bicycle strip and when the … is blocked
[04.05.2026 – 30.06.2026]

item.title: Otto-Probst-Straße crossing Tesarekplatz
item.description: The public bus lines affected in the construction site area will be redirected accordingly. [04.05.2026 – 14.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The public bus lines affected in the construction site area will be redirected accordingly.
[04.05.2026 – 14.06.2026]

item.title: Universitätsstraße crossing Landesgerichtsstraße and Garnisongasse
item.description: Transport measures are largely taken over by the construction works metro, also in the streets of the lower road network. [Since 03.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Transport measures are largely taken over by the construction works metro, also in the streets of the lower road network.
[Since 03.05.2026]

item.title: Gentzgasse from Aumannplatz and Lazaristengasse to Köhlergasse
item.description: Since also the affected tram lines in the period of the 4. The track construction works in the Währinger Straße from the ON 125 to the Aumannplatz, on the Aumannplatz from the … [27.04.2026 – 12.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Since also the affected tram lines in the period of the 4. The track construction works in the Währinger Straße from the ON 125 to the Aumannplatz, on the Aumannplatz from the …
[27.04.2026 – 12.07.2026]

item.title: Simonygasse opp. 2B
item.description: Only the house connections (carriage crossings) at night (maximum 5 nights) in the idle time of the tram with the free keeping of at least 3,50 m wide … [26.04.2026 – 03.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Only the house connections (carriage crossings) at night (maximum 5 nights) in the idle time of the tram with the free keeping of at least 3,50 m wide …
[26.04.2026 – 03.07.2026]

item.title: Linzer Straße from junction Hüttelbergstraße and Bergmillergasse to junction Wolfersberggasse
item.description: The stop of the affected bus lines at the Bujattigasse will be temporarily moved to the Wolfersberggasse ON 1. [19.04.2026 – 31.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The stop of the affected bus lines at the Bujattigasse will be temporarily moved to the Wolfersberggasse ON 1.
[19.04.2026 – 31.07.2026]
